Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEVEN T. SAGER FOR CO-ADMINISTRATORS;

ATTY. SAGER REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION CONFIRMING TITLE TO REAL PROPERTY LOCATED ON CASTRO STREET. THE COURT CALLED WAYNE HONG AND MS. BERTHA RAMOS(INTERPRETER FOR MR. HONG) AND AFFIRMED THAT MR. HONG DID NOT HAVE ANY OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lee.
